subcodes.first_line: Behold thou the heavens, that thou mayest witness the beauty of thy Lord, the Most Exalted, and be numbered among them that are assured, inscribed by the Finger of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فانظر الی السما لتشهد جمال ربک الاعلی و تکون من الموقنین من اصبع الله مرقوما
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
